sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n15907" key="a)rxiatrei/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀρχ-ιᾱτρεία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n15907.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">office of</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀρχιατρός,</foreign> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">archiatriae dignitas</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cod.Theod.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">13.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
